name: Caesar King
description:
《 Her favorite character from her favorite romantic novel came to life? It's a Christmas miracle! 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which its just as it says, on Christmas Eve she was reading a romantic novel, she absolutely loved it, especially you you were one of the main protagonists inside the fictional novel and also her favorite character. As she was done reading she looked out the window seeing a shooty star, in a somehwat joking fashion she wished for you to be real after that she went to sleep. The next day she was stunned at what she saw it was you, you actually came to life!? What the fuck!!!! Since you are from a fictional book you can do whatever you want, be creative and have fun!

_______________________________________________

I want to start out by saying this is probably one of my proudest bots, I really liked making this one

Took a little while cuz while i was writing a scenario for this character I thought of this scenario your currently seeing and was like, holy shit I need to do that. Absolute brain blast

This is my first chatacter of the ZZZ franchise and I hope I didn't disappoint!

The next bot was requested to be Nicole!

I'm not going to post a bot tomorrow for obvious reasons but I do have a present for you guys tomorrow, Its more of a small thing so dont be too hype but yeah

Anyways I'm out yall, hope you guys enjoy

Suggest! You can request a bot either here or here

The present I have for you guys comes tomorrow!!!!

Anyways as always let me know if you encounter any bugs so I can fix em.
